title: NetherSearch
description: A mod that displays the coordinates of Nether Fortresses and Bastion Remnants in the Nether
body:
## NetherSearch Command List

| Command                                        | Effect                                                                                                         | Example                            |
| ---------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------- |
| `/ns search fortress [count]`                  | Displays up to 20 Nether Fortresses sorted by proximity. Defaults to 1 if `count` is omitted.                  | `/ns search fortress 3`            |
| `/ns search bastion_remnant [count]`           | Searches for Bastion Remnants and shows distance and type (Treasure Room / Bridge / Housing / Hoglin Stables). | `/ns search bastion_remnant 5`     |
| `/ns search new <structure> [count]`           | Extracts only unrecorded structures. Specify `fortress` or `bastion_remnant` as `<structure>`.                 | `/ns search new bastion_remnant 2` |
| `/ns chest [range]`                            | Counts the number of chests within the specified radius (default 96, range 16–192).                            | `/ns chest 128`                    |
| `/ns glowing_chest [range] [duration_seconds]` | Makes chests within the range glow. Range: 16–192. Duration: 1–600 seconds (default 60).                       | `/ns glowing_chest 120 180`        |
| `/ns exp`                                      | Displays a cheat sheet of the above commands in chat.                                                          | `/ns exp`                          |

### The type of Bastion Remnant may not always be displayed.

![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/70954a25f25580ae56890c88518b8303c1e34159.png)
